summary: High‑quality audience recording praised for clearer sound than the boomy Pauline 421 source
review: The reviewer rates this recent Me‑80 pull as the best available audience source, noting it sounds clearer and less boomy than the Pauline 421 tape. No comments are made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, brief review was provided; it is positive about the recording quality but offers no insight into the show, so rating leans on the strong audio endorsement.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer finds this Me‑80 audience pull clearer and less boomy than the Pauline 421 source; no specific issues reported.
